ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date for the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last communication with the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device type */,
  "power_requirements" TEXT /* Power requirements (e.g., voltage, current) */,
  "communication_protocol" TEXT /* Communication protocol used (e.g., MQTT, HTTP, WebSocket) */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum operating temperature */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum operating temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpio_pins" (
  "gpio_pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPIO pin */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the pin belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the GPIO pin */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the GPIO pin */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the GPIO pin (e.g., input, output, inout) */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard of the GPIO pin (e.g., 3.3-V LVTTL) */,
  "pin_number" INTEGER /* Number of the GPIO pin */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage level of the GPIO pin */,
  "current_capacity" REAL /* Maximum current capacity of the GPIO pin */,
  "pin_status" TEXT /* Current status of the GPIO pin */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the pin status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpio_pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpio_pins_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpio_pin_configurations" (
  "gpio_pin_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPIO pin configuration */,
  "gpio_pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPIO pin being configured */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the GPIO pin (e.g., input, output, high, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "configured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who configured the GPIO pin */,
  "configured_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpio_pin_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpio_pin_configurations_configured_by FOREIGN KEY ("configured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpio_pin_configurations_gpio_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("gpio_pin_id") REFERENCES gpio_pins ("gpio_pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "device_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device status update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., online, offline, error) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Detailed message or error code for the status */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the status update */,
  "handled_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status update was handled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_handled_by FOREIGN KEY ("handled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_documents_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_documents_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, technician) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
